rulings.Case Title: HEIDI DENTON et al VS. KWAN SHIU YAN FUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 17, 2015, line 2. Defendant's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to paragraph 12 and lines 11-13 of paragraph 13. Motion is granted as to the following: "As such, the principle of collateral estoppel bars re-litigation of the issues raised in these findings." = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HEIDI DENTON et al VS. KWAN SHIU YAN FUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 17, 2015, line 2. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint OVERRULED. (1) Complaint sufficiently alleges the nature of the contract between Plaintiff and Defendants; (2) Demurrer does not lie to a part of a cause of action and, therefore, the issue of release of claims cannot be addressed at this time; (3) Manefee is distinguishable as the notice in this case is not alleged to be defective on its face. Nothing on the face of the complaint shows that the statute of limitations has run. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLENE FINLEY VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 17, 2015, line 3. Defendant's Demurer to First Amended Complaint continued to September 30, 2015 to give Plaintiff an opportunity to file and a Motion for Leave to File Second Amended Complaint. Such motion, if filed, should be notices in accordance with CCP 1005 and 1013. = (501/REQ)
